creator: han@log69.com
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Hi,

As i see it couldn't fetch the tarball. I just gave it a try and it
downloads just fine from my site:
http://log69.com/downloads/aaphoto_sources_v0.32.tar.gz

The build goes well too for me starting make from
my /usr/ports/graphics/aaphoto directory on 8.0-RELEASE.

Also, i just noticed that there is a colon ':' character at the end of
the link in the log below that you attached. That might be the problem.
Maybe something went wrong with the .shar file when i uploaded through
the website.

portlint also ran successfully on the port.

In case, i attach the .shar file to this e-mail too.


Thanks,
Andras
- -----------------------------------------------------------


On Fri, 25 Dec 2009 20:04:33 +0800
wen heping <wenheping@gmail.com> wrote:

> Hi,
> 
>     The build failed as below, would you have a check of it and fix
> it ?
>
